SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Power Void
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This faction has no central authority figure. Which resulted in a power void while a new leader is established.

effects.li: Defenses at this faction's bases and sites are weakened
Raids from this faction are disabled
Captured pawns from this faction have a reduced resistance

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Power Struggle
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This base is undergoing a power struggle to determine its new leader.
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.endMessage: The power struggle at {0} has ended

effects.li: Sites generated by this base have 40% reduced threat points.
Raids originating from this base have 40% reduced points.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Fortifying
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This base has bolstered its defenses significantly.

effects.li: Threat level is doubled when generating this base and its claimed sites.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Inspection
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This base is scheduled for inspection by higher command.

effects.li: Faction/Base leadership are much more likely to spawn at this base.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Vigilant
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This base is being extremely attentive to its surroundings.

effects.li: Caravans within 10 tiles are much more likely to be noticed.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Rioting
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This base is fed up with its local leadership and is currently attempting to overthrow them.
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.startMessage: {0} has started rioting against its leaders
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.endMessage: The rioting at {0} has ended with a new leader

effects.li: At the end of this event, a new base leader is generated.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Famine
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This base is experiencing a famine. Sending food to this base can greatly increase relations.

effects.li: Food given via trade or drop pod will result in +15 Relations.
When attacking this base, enemy pawns will generate with malnutrition.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Sanctioned
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This faction has been sanctioned and does not have the funds to trade.

effects.li: Faction bases will refuse to trade.
Faction will not send out trade caravans.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Heavily Supported
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This base is currently heavily supported by their faction. Any attack on this base will cause them to use their best equipment.

effects.li: Attacks on this base will trigger heavy defense deployments.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Prisoner Transfer
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.description: This base is currently supporting a Prisoner Transfer. When attacking there will be a high number of prisoners present.
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.endMessage: The prisoner transfer at {0} has concluded

effects.li: Generating this base will spawn prisoners from this faction during the raid.

SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.label: Reinforcements
SimpleLeadership.PowerEventDef.endMessage: {0} no longer has reinforcements on standby

effects.li: Attacking this base will immediately trigger reinforcements to be called.
